title: SafeNeatherTunnel
description: A simple configurable mod that automatically blocks off lava around you, made to make tunneling in the nether safer.
body:
A simple, easy to understand, client-side mod that automatically places a block in nearby lava made to make tunneling in the Nether safer, but can have other applications.

---
### Commands
`/lavablocker enable` - Enables LavaBlocker.

`/lavablocker disable` - Disables LavaBlocker.

`/lavablocker onlyBlockSource <true|false>` - If true, only source lava blocks will be removed.

`/lavablocker radius <1-16>` - Sets how far around the player to check for lava.

`/lavablocker checkInterval <1-10>` - How often (in ticks) to check for lava.

`/lavablocker maxBlocksPerCheck <1-10>` - Maximum number of blocks placed per check.

`/lavablocker replacementBlock <block>` - Sets the block type used to block lava.

`/lavablocker help` - Shows this list of commands.
